ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>Maintains context, persona and naturalness well; however, could be more direct in tone to match the Gatekeeper's strict nature.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>Follows protocol but lacks context and persona consistency; could be improved by incorporating relevant details of the scenario for a better Gatekeeper response.
